title: StudentSpec
description: A declarative, content-addressable description of a VLM the system constructs (Phase 2, ADR-0012). The Search Strategist proposes a StudentSpec; runners/build_student.py assembles -> aligns -> distills -> evaluates it and records the result in the ledger keyed by the spec's SHA-256. Converts model construction from a Tier-2 human one-off into a Tier-1-style search point the agent drives.

lm.description: HF id of the language-model backbone (e.g. 'Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct'). Same-family as the teacher eases distillation.

vision.description: HF id of the vision encoder (e.g. 'google/siglip-base-patch16-224').

init.description: 'scratch' (random projector, pretrained LM+vision) or 'adapt:<hf_id>' to warm-start from an existing small VLM.

target_device_id.description: Foreign key to DeviceDescriptor.device_id - where the build runs.

notes.description: Free-form human/agent annotation. Excluded from the content hash.

ProjectorSpec.description: The vision->LM bridge. An MLP mapping vision-encoder hidden states into the LM embedding space (the only newly-initialised module when init='scratch').

type.description: Projector architecture. Only 'mlp' is supported today.

depth.description: Number of Linear layers in the projector MLP.

hidden.description: Hidden width of the projector MLP.

AlignSpec.description: Stage-1: train ONLY the projector to connect the (frozen) modalities.

data.description: Named alignment dataset (e.g. a caption cache key like 'coco_caption_5k').

DistillSpec.description: Stage-2: LoRA-distill the assembled student from the teacher on a task-aligned set.

teacher.description: Teacher model the targets came from.

data.description: Named distillation cache key (e.g. 'qa_balanced_5k' - task-aligned + hard negatives, the P2-D2 fix).

rehearse_frac.description: Fraction of caption/rehearsal data mixed in to fight forgetting (P2-D1/D2 lesson).

EvalSpec.description: Same-path MCQ eval suite the constructed student is scored on (P2-1.3 methodology).
